item.title: The Long Game of Learning
item.description: Deep competence is a forty-year project. Why mastery isn't binary, early exposure builds scaffolding, and the real rewards compound over decades.

item.title: LLMs in Recruiting
item.description: The Application as Audition — Lessons from Unravel Tech and the विपरीत केकावली. The process of using the AI is the test.

item.title: Don't Dumb It Down: Kids Can Handle Complexity
item.description: Simple approach for new parents: don't shrink the world for kids. Keep it true, keep it kind, keep it interactive. Don't simplify the truth—simplify the path into it.

item.title: US State Demographics — Oat Grid
item.description: Interactive demo showcasing US state demographics using American Community Survey data in a clean Oat UI 12-column grid layout.

item.title: विपरीत केकावली — A Creative Marathi Exercise with LLMs
item.description: A creative homework exercise for Marathi students: compose the viparit (corollary) of Moropant's Kekavali using LLM tools while deepening understanding of classical poetry.

item.title: Blog Feeds in OPML and HTML
item.description: Discover a curated collection of technical blogs with OPML and a readable HTML listing.

item.title: Turn a $30 Phone into a Smart Home Sensor
item.description: Use VibeMonitor to transform a cheap prepaid smartphone into a vibration sensor for your dryer, washer, or any appliance.

item.title: Reflections on "If" by Rudyard Kipling
item.description: Exploring the timeless wisdom in Rudyard Kipling's poem about character, resilience, and integrity. A test of the blog posting workflow.

item.title: Chapter 1: Logarithms, Exponentials & Half-Life
item.description: An interactive journey through growth, decay, and the mathematics of change. Explore exponential functions, logarithms, and half-life with visual experiments.
